      • getFunctionSymbol

        public Function getFunctionSymbol()
        Returns:
        the functionSymbol

      • getArity

        public int getArity()
        Arity of an embedded JavaDL Expression depends upon the number of arguments. Since the first argument may be implicitly given, we cannot use the arity of functionSymbol.
        Specified by:
        getArity in class Operator
